MORALE: Fearless (19-20) XP VALUE: 1,000 The giant sea anemone is a larger and far more dangerous version of its smaller relative. Although it lives at a variety or ocean depths, it is encountered singly below 50 feet. The anemone has a stout central body about 8 fee
[PDF_PAGE 36 | score=6] stances), the victim instantly returns to normal size. Casting dispel magic on a tiny death minnow caus- ing it to grow to its monster size of 8 feet, making it a far easier target. There are no known “wild” popu- lations of death min- nows. These are magi- cal guard beasts. As they are created magi- cally, they do not need to breed. In fact, it is uncer- tain if they even have male and female sexes. As a magical guardian beast, the death minnow ensures that the immediate vicinity it is set to guard remains free of such dangerous predators as adventurers. If the party can kill one, its blood might be used as an ingredient in the ink used for penning enlarge or shrink on spell scrolls. If, in
